"use client"; import { useState } from "react"; import { useSkills } from "@/lib/SkillContext"; import { RetentionEngine } from "@/lib/retention-engine"; import { AddSkillModal } from "@/components/AddSkillModal"; import { formatDate, formatFutureDate } from "@/lib/utils"; import { Plus, Target, AlertTriangle, BookOpen, PenTool, ChevronRight, Zap, Activity, TrendingDown, ArrowUpRight, ArrowDownRight, Lightbulb } from "lucide-react"; import Link from "next/link"; import { HeroSection } from "@/components/ui/HeroSection"; import { TiltCard } from "@/components/ui/TiltCard"; import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"; export default function Dashboard() { const { skills, removeSkill, markPracticed } = useSkills(); const [showAddModal, setShowAddModal] = useState(false); const router = useRouter(); const profile = RetentionEngine.getCognitiveProfile(skills); const { today } = RetentionEngine.getRevisionTasks(skills); const missingPrereqs = skills.flatMap(s => (s.missingPrerequisites || []).map(p => ({ skillName: s.name, prereq: p }))); const handleStartLearning = () => { document.getElementById("dashboard-content")?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }); }; return (
{/* Header */}
Global Telemetry Live

Cognitive Profile

{/* Missing Prerequisites Alert */} {missingPrereqs.length > 0 && (

Missing Foundational Knowledge

AI detected attempts to learn advanced topics without requisite foundations. Your projected velocity will suffer. Address these immediately:

{missingPrereqs.slice(0, 5).map((p, i) => (
{p.skillName} requires: {p.prereq}
))}
)} {/* BENTO GRID: Dashboard Core */}
{/* Main Analytics Container */}
Retention Analytics

Neural Link Stable

{skills.length} skills tracked. Active cognitive decay models running autonomously across {profile.globalWeaknesses.length + profile.globalStrengths.length} neural nodes.

Global Health
Excellent
Learning Velocity
{profile.learningSpeed > 0 ? profile.learningSpeed : "--"} / 100
Forgetting Rate
{profile.forgettingSpeed > 0 ? profile.forgettingSpeed : "--"} %
{/* AI Mentor Suggestion Card */}

AI Mentor Insight

{profile.globalWeaknesses.length > 0 ? `Your structural decay in ${profile.globalWeaknesses[0]} requires immediate scenario simulation. Generate a diagnostic quiz to reinforce this pathway.` : "Your retention curves are highly optimal. Consider adding more advanced prerequisite algorithms to push your boundaries."}

{/* Tasks Due Today Bento Row */}

Action Required Today

{today.length > 0 && ( {today.length} Due )}
{today.length === 0 ? (

All neural pathways are fully reinforced.

) : (
{today.map(task => (
router.push(task.action === "quiz" ? `/quiz?skill=${task.skillId}` : `/study?skill=${task.skillId}`)}>
{task.skillName}
Retention: {task.retentionScore}%
))}
)} {/* Weak Skills Bento */}

Critical Weaknesses

{profile.globalWeaknesses.length === 0 ? (

No major weaknesses detected! Keep taking diagnostic quizzes to let AI map your boundaries.

) : (
{profile.globalWeaknesses.map((wk, i) => ( {wk} ))}
)}
{/* Empty State */} {skills.length === 0 && (
setShowAddModal(true)}>

Initialize Cognitive Tracking

Add your first skill to start tracking neural retention and automatically generate immersive revision methodologies.

)} setShowAddModal(false)} /> {/* Your Skills Grid */} {skills.length > 0 && (

Your Neural Pathways

{skills.map(skill => (
router.push(`/skill/${skill.id}`)}>

{skill.name}

{skill.category} ΓÇó {skill.proficiency}
{skill.status.toUpperCase()}
Retention Link {skill.retentionScore}%
Config
{ e.stopPropagation(); markPracticed(skill.id); }}>
))}
)}
); }

"use client"; import React from "react"; import { motion } from "framer-motion"; import { LampContainer } from "./lamp"; import { Particles } from "./particles"; import { AnimatedGridPattern } from "./animated-grid-pattern"; import { BackgroundBeams } from "./background-beams"; import { BorderBeam } from "@/registry/magicui/border-beam"; import { CardContainer, CardBody, CardItem } from "./3d-card"; import { Sparkles, Brain, Target, CalendarClock } from "lucide-react"; export function HeroSection() { const handleStartLearning = () => { document.getElementById("dashboard-content")?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }); }; return (
{/* 1. Base Layer Animations */} {/* 2. Lamp Container powering the Text Hierarchy */}
Neural Link Stabilized

Cognizance Next

AI-Powered Cognitive Learning Platform.
Stop tracking tasks. Start tracking knowledge retention.

{/* CTA Layer */}
{/* Start Learning Button (Filled + Glow) */} {/* View Analytics Button (Glass) */}
{/* 3. Floating 3D Physics Concept Cards */}
{/* Card 1: AI Mentor */}
AI Mentor Generate highly tailored Scenarios, Flashcards, and Concept Notes using advanced LLM reasoning that maps strictly to your weak areas.
{/* Card 2: Retention Tracking */}
Retention Tracking Neural decay modeling tracks forgetting curves across all your skills, displaying an exact retention percentage predicting memory lapse.
{/* Card 3: Smart Review */}
Smart Planner Autonomous calendar sequencing orchestrates your reviews exactly when your cognitive pathway is on the verge of fracturing.
); }
